sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Diogenes Laertius</hi> [D.L.] <date TEIform="date">iii A.D. Cobet: accedunt <title_ TEIform="title">Olympiodori, Ammonii, Iamblichi, Porphyrii et aliorum vitae Platonis, Aristotelis, Pythagorae, Plotini et Isidori,</title_> Ant. Westermanno, et <title_ TEIform="title">Marini vita Procli</title_> J. F. Boissonadio edentibus, Paris (D.) 1862. <title_ TEIform="title">Epigrammata:</title_> v. <title_ TEIform="title">Anthologia Graeca.</title_> </item>
